message.content:
@startuml
participant "Controller" as Controller
participant "<UDP or TCP>Service" as Service
participant "Volt.<Udp or Tcp>Server" as Server
participant "AppSettings" as AppSettings
participant "MessageEncryptionChannel" as EncryptionChannel

Controller -> Service: server()
Service -> AppSettings: getApplicationKey()
Service -> EncryptionChannel: create(applicationKey)
Service -> Server: channel(route, encryptionChannel)
Service -> Server: Expect for routes and stream the service ...
@enduml
